meta.note: Per-entry DAI is the holder's THEORETICAL claim (TRIBE × rate). Sum across entries exceeds the contract's actual DAI cap; first-come-first-served on redemption. contract_token_balances is the actual cap.

description: Tribe DAO post-shutdown redemption. Each TRIBE token entitles the holder to a proportional share of the 4-token basket [stETH, LQTY, FOX, DAI]. Only DAI is tracked here for the v2 hero counter; other basket items still pay out on claim.
